comments.comment: Chevron undertook detailed BTEX testing at this facility to ensure that we could accurately report our emissions.  As a result of this detailed analyses, our benzene emissions were reduced from 5.78 tonnes to 2.48 tonnes, which is a more accurate reflecti

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The 1999 ethylene glycol number is reduced by approximatey 50% from 1998 numbers due to an optimization of the system and from an increase in the "dry" gas rate.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Methanol is a process chemical and its usage flucuates depending on operating conditions such as weather.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The increase in Isopropyl Alcohol in 1999 is due to the addition of the process chemical CRW01000Y that was added to our process.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The decrease in Ethylene glycol was due to not having a turnaround at the plant in 2001.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The decrease in DEA was due to not having a turnaround at the plant in 2001 and less plant upsets.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Reduction in methanol was due to less hydrate problems in plant throughout year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Decrease in chlorine was due to lower injection rates to maintain residual and less cooling tower make-up water required to treat.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increased rate of Ammonia was due to an increase in purge rates to remove H2S from liquid sulphur.
